creator: peter.henderson@ieee.org
text:
For sometime I have been unable to upgrade from lightning-0.9.2.

Extract from output of "make install" run in /usr/ports/mail/lightning


===>  Building for lightning-0.9_3
rm -f -rf ./dist/sdk
rm -f -rf ./dist/include
/usr/local/bin/gmake -C config export
gmake[1]: Entering directory `/usr/ports/mail/lightning/work/mozilla/config'
